name: Warfarin Dose Response - Stable In-Range INR Query
description: Tests ability to find patients with stable in-range INR (target 2.0-3.0) per PheKB algorithm. This identifies the pharmacogenetic discovery cohort — patients whose warfarin dose has stabilized.
prompt: Find patients with INR results in the therapeutic range of 2.0 to 3.0, indicating stable warfarin anticoagulation.

prompts.broad: Find patients with international normalized ratio (INR) values between 2.0 and 3.0 — the standard therapeutic range for warfarin anticoagulation.
prompts.expert: Search Observation for LOINC 6301-6 (INR) with value-quantity ge2.0 and le3.0. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|6301-6&value-quantity=ge2.0&value-quantity=le3.0

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with stable in-range INR (PheKB target 2-3).

required_codes.display: INR in Platelet poor plasma by Coagulation assay
